profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Getting something both weird and working into the world is harder than a thousand polished normals.
profile.working_on: app giving one creative prompt daily that forces completion before unlocking the next

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to ignite creativity and embrace the messiness of innovation, valuing authentic expression over conventional perfection.
